title: Relationship Index
subtitle: Status, trends and comparison
no_couple_desc: The index is available for couples only
empty_desc: Complete the assessment together to see your relationship index
crisis_critical_title: We recommend starting a recovery plan
crisis_critical_desc: Critical level means serious issues in one or more areas.
gap_discuss: Worth discussing — your perceptions differ in this area
common_ground_note: You agree in these areas — that's your foundation.
bridge_no_couple_desc: The understanding bridge is available for couples only
bridge_hero_desc: Visualize the gap between your perceptions — where your views align and where they diverge.
bridge_empty_desc: Complete the assessment together to see the bridge of understanding
